phase_name: Signal space, geometry, line constraint, Schur gap

completed_tasks.name: Signal space: 15-dim was truncation artifact. Margin converges at large N. 73 near-zero eigenvalues converged.
Geometry: Loewner inertia, CND, Bezoutian, interlacing -- all 4 killed.
Line constraint: dh/d(sigma)=0, h_pair minimized, dual test functions squeeze, tube width delta~0.01.
KNIFE-EDGE: Lorentzian only at exact Gamma diagonal. -log(n) unique critical rate. Scale 0.95->57pos, 1.00->1pos, 1.05->13pos.
Phase transition mapped: upper edge at scale=1.000000037, 52 eigenvalue avalanche, primes required.
0/2200 random alternatives Lorentzian. 100% arithmetic. Cramer best eig_max=+4.26 vs actual -1.6e-7.
Turan d=2 and Lorentzian are independent paths (not same fact). Prior Turan kills stand.
SCHUR GAP ~4: dominant inequality (c.v0)^2 < |a1|*|lam0| has gap 2-6 across all lambda. Residual/gap ratio shrinks to 0.35% at large lambda. 5 orders of magnitude more room than eigenvalue margin.

remaining_tasks.name: PROVE (c.v0)^2 < |a1|*|lambda_0(B)| analytically from the explicit formula. Gap ~4. All three quantities determined by primes + Gamma.
PROVE residual coupling < gap. Residual = sum_{k>0} (c.u_k)^2/|lam_k|. Shrinks relative to gap at large lambda.
Update paper with Sessions 78-79 findings (knife-edge, Schur gap, proof structure).

next_action: Prove the dominant Schur inequality. The gap is ~4 (not 10^{-7}). Approach options: (1) bound (c.v0)^2 via Cauchy structure of the off-diagonal, (2) bound |lambda_0(B)| via interlacing + trace constraints, (3) use the explicit formula identity to relate a_1, lambda_0, and c algebraically, (4) find a convexity/variational argument that forces the gap positive.
context_notes: 228 commits. 79 sessions. The proof reduces to one product inequality with gap ~4 plus a residual bound. The eigenvalue margin 10^{-7} was the wrong decomposition -- the Schur decomposition reveals a 2.7% gap at the dominant mode level. The residual (2.7% of total coupling) fills most of this gap but doesn't exceed it. At large lambda, the residual becomes negligible (<1% of gap). Key infrastructure: session79d_mechanism.py, session79b_explicit_formula_forces_lorentzian.py. Paper at v7 (682 lines). The knife-edge discovery (Gamma diagonal at exact scale=1.0) and 0/2200 arithmetic specificity are the strongest structural results.
